subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my Lord! This is a servant whose lineage traces back to Thy servant, who for Thy sake was banished and exiled to the land of Sudan [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی هذا عبد نسبته الی عبدک الذی طرد و نفی فی سبیلک الی ارض السودان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @martyrs and martyrdom
